Welcome to the future of education

Expert tutoring for academic excellence

Personalized learning, project-based growth, and premium academic support in one platform.

Universal Learner now pairs your trusted tutoring brand with a secure full-stack workspace for students, teachers, parents, and administrators.

Trust Signals

Shopify + Supabase

Student dashboard

Projects, assessments, progress

Protected role-based access

A single platform for public brand storytelling, secure tutoring operations, family visibility, and post-purchase enrollment unlocks.

Our Expertise

Learning experiences designed to build confidence, mastery, and momentum.

The live Shopify brand emphasizes trusted tutoring and high-touch support. This rebuild preserves that tone while extending it into a polished SaaS platform.

1 on 1 personalized learning

Tailored instruction designed specifically for each learner's pace, strengths, and growth areas.

Project-Based Learning

Real projects that connect academic mastery to confidence, creativity, and authentic problem solving.

Game-Based Learning

Focused, motivating practice loops that make challenge feel rewarding rather than intimidating.

Concept Mapping

Visual frameworks that deepen understanding, strengthen memory, and build independent thinking.

How It Works

A tutoring method that feels personal, structured, and accountable.

These steps are pulled directly from the current brand messaging and now map cleanly into consultations, onboarding, and dashboard milestones.

Step 1

Assessment to understand the learner's level, goals, and current momentum.

Step 2

Personalized planning with a custom roadmap for skills, projects, and support.

Step 3

Dedicated tutoring sessions that blend direct teaching, coaching, and practice.

Step 4

Progress tracking with ongoing refinements for confidence, consistency, and results.

Programs

Commerce-ready offers that stay connected to your operational platform.

Shopify remains the commerce layer for product pages and checkout, while the app handles enrollment, access control, and ongoing learning workflows.

Grade Ace Tutoring

Targeted support for better grades, stronger routines, and renewed academic confidence.

$0.01

The Scholar Program

Structured tutoring with deeper skill-building across core subjects and study systems.

A premium blend of tutoring, project-based learning, and strategic growth support.

Platform Experience

Your prototype dashboard concepts now live inside a scalable full-stack product.

Projects, assessments, feedback, whiteboard collaboration, profile management, and role-based visibility all evolve from the original HTML/CSS/JS prototype.

Student submissions with storage-backed uploads
Teacher grading and feedback tools
Parent visibility with purchase-linked access
Admin analytics, permissions, and program controls

Protected routes

Supabase auth plus middleware guard every app workspace.

Row-level security

Each role sees only the data it should be allowed to access.

Commerce unlocks

Shopify purchases trigger enrollment and entitlements through webhooks.

Testimonials

Stories that create trust still deserve a prime place in the new experience.

The existing Shopify site uses student wins and community tone as trust signals. We keep that human layer front and center.

“My grades improved from C's to A's in just one semester.”

Sarah M.

High School Student

“I finally feel confident in my abilities. Thank you for believing in me.”

Emma L.

Middle School Student

“The structure, accountability, and personal attention made a huge difference for our family.”

Parent of an 8th Grade Learner

Parent

Subjects We Teach

Academic support across core subjects and interdisciplinary growth.

We preserve the current subject mix while making room for programs, student dashboards, and outcomes reporting.

Logic & Critical Thinking

Ready to Launch

A premium education brand on the outside, a robust role-based platform on the inside.

Start with the homepage, connect auth, and extend into dashboards without losing the warmth and trust of the current brand.

Universal Learner

Trusted educational support for students, teachers, and families who want stronger outcomes with more clarity.

This platform combines a premium public brand experience with secure dashboards, progress tracking, feedback tools, and Shopify-powered enrollment.
